violations.text: Seasonal menu is lacking an allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2026

Cleaning supplies and oven mitts were observed in the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2026
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2026
Spray bottles used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2026

Thermometers are lacking in refrigeration unit(s). All cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer inside the unit that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2026

The door to the outside, located at the back of the establishment, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2026
Refrigerator door gasket of the small prep unit observed in poor repair, splitting away from the door. Gasket is to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2026
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dishwasher at the bar. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the kitchen dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2026
Spray hose at the 3-bay sink is in poor repair and is wrapped with plastic wrap. Spray hose must be properly repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2026
Cleaning supplies were observed in/on the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2025
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back of the establishment, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2025
